TextView.android:text: Layered triage, routing, queue, and test suggestions
Capture what the patient knows first, then add nurse measurements if available

com.google.android.material.textfield.Te.android:hint: e.g. chest pain, shortness of breath

TextView.android:text: Leave these blank if they have not been measured yet. If a field is unfamiliar, the nurse can fill it in later.
Patient symptom predictions will appear here
